productDisplayName: Puma Men Brown Future Cat Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for everyday wear, the puma range of everyday sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. The Future cat M1 SF comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a textured backfoot finish. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear. Product Details Features a low-profile design for durability with a pemium leather upper for longer wear  Lightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfort  Asymmetrical lacing system gives a snug fi  Textile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfort  Embroidered jumping cat logo on the medial side of the midfoot and cat logo embossed on the lateral toe Upper adhered to the outsole for durability TPR outsole for enhanced traction  Embedded puma Future Cat embedded on the rubber outsole Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard with a branded lug at the heel collar for style Material and Care Synthetic, leather Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
